# Introduction {.unnumbered}

This book is the single source of truth for **Project Name**.
It covers everything the team needs to know: background, concepts, guides, and reference material.

## Purpose

Good documentation serves three audiences:

- **New team members** — get up to speed without having to ask around.
- **Practitioners** — find the answer to a specific question quickly.
- **Stakeholders** — understand what the project is and why decisions were made.

## Overview

The image below is a placeholder — replace it with a diagram, screenshot, or any visual
that gives readers an immediate sense of the subject.

![Demo Image](.attachments/demo.png){fig-alt="Overview diagram (placeholder)" width=80%}

| Section | What you will find |
| --- | --- |
| **Concepts** | Background knowledge and key terms |
| **Guides** | Step-by-step instructions for common tasks |
| **Reference** | Detailed specifications and configuration options |

## How to Use This Book

Navigate using the sidebar. If you are new, read top to bottom.
If you are looking for something specific, use the search box.

## Contributing

All changes go through a merge request. The CI pipeline lints every `.md` and `.qmd` file
and renders both the website and the Word document. See `README.md` for local setup.
